caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is recorded in a sound studio featuring dark grey acoustic foam walls. He wears black over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt with a logo on the left chest that includes the text "Story Studio". A professional silver microphone on a black boom arm is positioned directly in front of his face. The man's right arm, which is heavily tattooed, is partially visible. Across the sequence, the man is speaking, with his facial expressions and mouth movements shifting slightly as he talks. His gaze remains mostly directed forward and slightly to the side. The camera angle is a steady medium close-up, and the background and equipment remain static throughout the clip while only the man's subtle movements and speech are captured.
